info.title: Wishgranter Rest API
info.description: This describes a restful API for a web-based music player. This is part of the [Wishgranter project](https://github.com/orgs/Wishgranter-project).

userId.name: userId
userId.description: The user's unique id in system.

playlistId.name: playlistId
playlistId.description: The id of a playlist within a collection.

itemUuid.name: itemUuid
itemUuid.description: The uuid V4 of a playlist item.

itemsPerPage.name: itemsPerPage
itemsPerPage.description: The maximum number of items to present per page.

page.name: page
page.description: The page we are aiming for

code.description: Machine code associated to the message, like an error code for example.

description.example: We could not find what you are looking for.
You are not authorized to access this resource.
Parameter X must be of the type Y.

title.description: The human-readable title of the playlist.

playableItem.description: A description of a playable item, a song or a full album.

cover.description: The original artist if the music is being performed by someone else.

soundtrack.description: An intellectual property featuring the music.

genre.description: Musical genre(s) the item belongs to.

allOf.description: A playable item saved within a playlist.

xxxOriginal.description: The UUID of the original item, marking this one as a copy. It essentially allows us to have the same music in multiple playlist. Changes in one should be reflected in the others.

userId.description: The user id within the system

name.description: The human-readable name of the artist or band.

source.description: Machine name of the service that we extracted this information from.

name.description: The human-readable title of the album.

source.description: Machine name of the service that we extracted this information from.

page.description: Describes a set of items within a larger set, a page.

resultsCount.description: The total number of items to be listed.

itemsPerPage.description: Maximum number of items a page may contain.

currentPageCount.description: Number of items within this set, this page. Naturally equal or less than itemsPerPage

resource.description: Represents a musical resource that can be reproduced.

provider.description: The machine name of the service that is providing it

title.description: Title of the resource within the provider's system.

description.description: Description of the resource within the provider's system.

thumbnail.description: Absolute URL to a thumbnail picture.

href.description: Absolute URL to the page of the resource

get.description: Returns a list of artists named in the collection and a count of items they are associated with.
Downloads all the playlists as a single zip file.

post.description: Creates a new playlist in the user's collection.

get.description: Returns a list of playlists in the user's collection.
Returns a single playlist in the collection.

post.description: Creates a new playlist item and adds it to the user's collection.

playlistId.description: The id of the playlist we are adding the item to.

description.example: New item added to your playlist.

get.description: Returns a list of playlists items.

parameters.name: playlistId
parameters.description: The ids of playlists to search for items. If empty, all playlists in the user's collection will be subject to the search.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Search parameter to match against the items' title.

parameters.name: artist
parameters.description: Search parameter to match against the items' artists.

parameters.name: genre
parameters.description: Search parameter to match against the items' genres.

parameters.name: soundtrack
parameters.description: Search parameter to match against the items' soundtracks.

get.description: Returns a single playlist item from the collection.
Retrieve information about the current session.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Search parameter, name of the artist or band

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Search parameter, title of the album (optional).

parameters.name: artist
parameters.description: Name of an artist or band

get.description: Returns information about a specific album, including a list of tracks.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Search parameter, title of the album.

parameters.name: artist
parameters.description: Name of an artist or band

example: The Bard's Song – In the Forest

parameters.name: cover
parameters.description: The original artist associated to the music if we are looking for a cover.

parameters.name: soundtrack
parameters.description: Intellectual property featuring the song as part of its soundtrack.
